Why Choose Teknorova?
At Teknorova, we turn your domain purchasing experience into a secure, fast, and seamless process. With our dedicated support, secure shopping guarantee, and quick transfer process, we meet all your needs.
24/7 Dedicated Support
You can get detailed information for any questions before and after your purchase, and receive uninterrupted support from a dedicated representative after buying your domain.
Secure Transaction Guarantee
Teknorova serves as a secure intermediary between buyers and sellers. With our secure payment system, all your transactions are fully protected.
Fast Transfer Process
Once you purchase a domain and your payment is confirmed, your premium domain will be assigned to your Teknorova profile before you even finish ordering a coffee.
Sıkça Sorulan Sorular
Alan adı satışıyla ilgili merak ettiğiniz soruların cevapları.
What is domain parking?
Domain parking is the process of temporarily redirecting an unused domain to a specific page on the internet. This allows you to list your domain for sale and attract potential buyers.
What are the benefits of domain parking?
Domain parking allows your domain to be visible even if it's not actively being used. This approach helps you connect with potential buyers by showcasing your domain for sale.
How can I park my domain?
To park your domain, sign up for Teknorova, log into your account, and select the domain you wish to park. You can then configure your parking page settings.
Is there a fee for domain parking?
No, Teknorova offers domain parking services free of charge. You can park your domain simply by creating an account.
Does domain parking affect SEO negatively?
Domain parking does not have a negative impact on SEO. Parked domains are typically redirected to temporary pages and do not directly influence SEO.
Can I sell my domain after parking it?
Yes, you can sell your domain after parking it. By listing your domain for sale through Teknorova, you can easily connect with potential buyers.
What will be displayed on my parked domain page?
Your parked domain page will display a message indicating that the domain is for sale, along with basic information about the domain. This is optimized to attract potential buyers.
How can I generate revenue from parked domains?
Direct revenue cannot be generated through Teknorova’s domain parking service. However, parking your domain makes it visible to potential buyers and can expedite the sales process.
Can I monitor traffic while my domain is parked?
No, Teknorova's domain parking service does not include traffic monitoring features. The parked domain page is designed to display basic information only.
What other services can I benefit from when parking my domain?
In addition to domain parking, you can benefit from secure sales services, 24/7 support, and fast transfer processes with Teknorova.
